Daily Official (market) Foreign Exchange Rates

Official (market) Exchange Rates on: 2026-04-05

1 AUSTRALIAN DOLLAR AUD / KZT 324.81

1 US DOLLAR USD / KZT 470.46

1 EURO EUR / KZT 543.10

The weighted average exchange rate of tenge against US dollar fixed on the stock exchange as of 15:30 Astana time is set as an official exchange rate.
